title: canarium asperum subsp. asperum
intro: Canarium asperum subsp. asperum, also known as the Mountain Canarium, is a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the family Burseraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Canarium asperum subsp. asperum include its ability to treat various ailments such as skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like decoctions, infusions, and salves, and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
